name: Stripe Sleek
description: Modern tech aesthetic featuring smooth indigo gradients, refined spacing, and extremely polished card components.
promptBlock: Use Stripe's iconic design system rules. Colors: background is pure white (#ffffff), foreground is deep navy (#0a2540), primary actions are vibrant violet (#635bff) with secondary accents in bright cyan (#00d4ff). Cards use soft backgrounds (#f6f9fc) and fine borders (#e3e8ee). Font for headings must be Outfit, body font is Inter. Use clean borders (8px radius) and subtle hover animations with shadow transitions.
